title: Re-padlocking of Office. The Department shall monitor establishments
content: 6 that had been subject of Closure Orders subsequently lifted and re-opened. Where a re- 7 opened office is subsequently confirmed as still being used for illegal recruitment 8 activities, a new Closure Order shall be issued which shall no longer be subject to a 9 Motion to Lift. 10 11
